transcript: Speaker A: Naa unna job panna venaamnu sollala. Seri, interview la English la kelvi ketta enna pannuva? Enakku call pannuviya? Modhalla English pesa kathukka. [I didn't say you shouldn't do a job. Okay, what will you do if they ask questions in English in the interview? Will you call me? First learn to speak English.] Speaker B: For your information, I can speak English very fluently and confidently. I don't need any help in understanding it. I used to be a topper in my school. And I think I can contribute better to the family with a job. Speaker A: Anna, ivlo nalla English pesa eppadi kathukitta? [Wow, how did you learn to speak English so well?] Speaker B: Naan SpeakX app download pannen. Athoda AI teacher oda, nee office pona time la practice pannen. Rende vaarathula ennodha English first class aayiduchu. Ippo yaar kitta venalum ennala English la pesa mudiyum. [I downloaded the SpeakX app. I practiced with its AI teacher while you were at the office. In just two weeks, my English became first-class. Now I can speak English with anyone.] Speaker A: Aiyah! Evlo kaasu aachu? [Oh! How much did it cost?] Speaker B: Oru tea ah vida kammi thaan. [Less than a cup of tea.] Speaker A: Enna solra? Seri, naanum inikke try panren. Enakkum office la English usagum. Ethana naal thaan idhe sambalathula vela seyyarathu. [What are you saying? Okay, I will also try today. I also need English at the office. How long can I work for the same salary?] Speaker B: Neengalum ellarayum surprise pannanuma? Ippove SpeakX app install pannunga. Rende vaarathula unga English romba fluent aayidum! [Do you also want to surprise everyone? Install the SpeakX app right now. In just two weeks, your English will become very fluent!]

summary: A husband doubts his wife's ability to clear job interviews due to her English skills, but she surprises him by speaking fluently. She credits her quick improvement to practicing with the SpeakX app's AI teacher, which costs less than a cup of tea. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app and start a 7-day trial.
